title: Move To Random Block Behavior
description: Allows mob to move towards a random block.

block_distance.title: Block Distance
block_distance.description: Defines the distance from the mob, in blocks, that the block to move to will be chosen.

within_radius.title: Within Radius
within_radius.description: Defines the distance in blocks the mob has to be from the block for the movement to be finished.

priority.title: Priority
priority.description: As priority approaches 0, the priority is increased. The higher the priority, the sooner this behavior will be executed as a goal.
